title: New Programmer Art Ores [PACP Addon]
description: Adapts the new ore shapes introduced in 1.17 to the Programmer Art style - addon for mzov_jen's Programmer Art Continuation Project.
body:
Adapts the new shapes of coal, iron, gold, and redstone ore from the 1.17 update to the Programmer Art style.

This resource pack is an addon for the [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp) by [mzov_jen](https://modrinth.com/user/mzov_jen).
